add_library(xlsxwriter STATIC
    src/app.c
    src/chart.c
    src/format.c
    src/hash_table.c
    src/packager.c
    src/relationships.c
    src/shared_strings.c
    src/table.c
    src/theme.c
    src/utility.c
    src/vml.c
    src/workbook.c
    src/worksheet.c
    src/xmlwriter.c
    src/zip.c
    src/content_types.c
    src/core.c
    src/custom.c
    src/drawing.c
    src/comment.c
    src/metadata.c
    src/rect.c
    src/io.c
)
target_include_directories(xlsxwriter PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/third_party
)
